zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏强，上行仍具空间
zh.content:
当前比特币价格稳步上行，最新报62912.71美元，较24小时内低点61690.6有所回升。整体趋势呈现震荡偏强格局，价格已站上20日均线(SMA20)62071.45美元，显示短期买盘力量尚可支撑。日内波动幅度较大，高点64234.45为近期阻力区域。

技术指标方面，MACD主线位于194.34，但信号线数据缺失，仍可观察其潜在金叉可能，暗示短线多头动能存在。RSI数据未提供，但从价格上行及均线支撑来看，买方情绪偏活跃，短期超买风险有限。

支撑与阻力上，61690美元附近为近期强支撑位，若下行回测可考虑逢低布局；上方64230美元附近为短期阻力位，突破后有望挑战65000美元整数关口。均线系统显示中期趋势向上，但需关注回调风险。

交易策略上，短线可维持多头思路，低吸高抛结合，分批建仓以降低波动风险。若价格失守61690美元支撑，则需及时止损或减仓。同时，关注市场消息面与资金流向，以辅助技术面判断整体行情。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is maintaining a constructive short-term uptrend, trading at 62,912.71 after a 1.89% gain over the last 24 hours. The price remains above the 20-day simple moving average at 62,071.45, indicating that buyers continue to control the broader near-term direction. Although BTC briefly approached the session high of 64,234.45, some profit-taking emerged near that area, suggesting that market participants are testing overhead supply before attempting a stronger breakout.

Momentum indicators generally favor the bullish case. The positive MACD reading of 194.34 points to strengthening upward momentum and confirms that recent price action has improved compared with prior sessions. While the RSI value is unavailable, the combination of a rising price structure and positive MACD suggests that bullish momentum remains intact. Traders should nevertheless remain attentive to volatility, as Bitcoin frequently experiences sharp intraday fluctuations even during healthy uptrends.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the SMA(20) region around 62,000, with stronger support emerging near the recent low at 61,690. A sustained move below these levels could weaken bullish sentiment and open the door to a deeper retracement. On the upside, resistance is concentrated around 64,200, corresponding closely with the recent session high. A decisive breakout above this zone would likely attract additional buying interest and could accelerate upward momentum.

For active traders, buying pullbacks toward the 62,000–62,200 support area may offer favorable risk-reward opportunities, provided price action remains stable above key moving-average support. More conservative participants may prefer to wait for a confirmed breakout above 64,200 before entering new long positions. Risk management remains essential, with stop-loss levels positioned below major support zones to protect against sudden reversals. Overall, the technical outlook remains moderately bullish as long as Bitcoin continues trading above its 20-day moving average.
